stemHtml: Which of the following statements with regard to the PET (Point of Equal Time) is correct?

options.a: Endurance is not relevant when calculating the point of equal time.
options.b: Endurance is relevant when calculating the point of equal time.
options.c: The point of equal time is a number which is entered in field 19 of the ATC flight plan.
options.d: When calculating the point of equal time fuel reserves should be accounted for.
